title: Wall Mirror 40 x 30 cm Stick On Mirror for Walls, Self Adhesive Frameless HD Glass Mirrors for Bathroom, Wardrobe Doors, Hallway, Bedroom (Oval)
features: 【Oval Charm – Light, Airy, Effortlessly Chic】With its smooth oval silhouette and frameless finish, this mirror opens up your space with gentle curves and a modern touch that feels both calming and stylish

【Frameless Glass – Clean Lines, Clear Reflection】Crafted from quality glass with no border or bevel, the mirror delivers a crisp, natural reflection without distortion. Ideal for grooming, skincare, or simply brightening a room

【40x30cm Compact Size – Perfect for Small Spaces】Measuring 40cm high by 30cm wide, it's ideal for bathrooms, bedrooms, hallways or rented flats where space is limited but style matters. Apply it above a shelf, sink or console for an instant lift

【No Drilling Required – Foam Adhesive Tape Included】Fitted with strong double-sided sponge tape, this mirror is easy to apply directly to smooth surfaces – no tools, no wall damage. A perfect solution for renters and DIY-averse decorators alike

【Versatile Styling – Subtle Elegance for Any Room】Whether used in a bathroom, dressing area or entryway, the oval shape adds a gentle focal point that complements both classic and contemporary décor. A simple yet stylish way to enhance your wall without overwhelming the space
description: From the brand Previous page Thank you for getting this far – we truly appreciate your patience! If you’ll kindly allow me, I’d be delighted to introduce you to our team " TSKDKIT " and the products we’ve thoughtfully created for you TSKDKIT -- Currently focus on adhesive mirrors because they’re a hassle-free, flexible solution for any space. No drilling, no mess—just stick and go! Plus, they’re perfect for anyone who likes the idea of rearranging things without leaving a trail of holes behind. We’ve opted for ease and practicality, because who needs extra work when you’re just trying to make your space look good? Maybe one day we’ll branch out, but for now, simplicity wins. Our Beginning "TSKDKIT" started in 2020 with a clear goal: to create mirrors that fit seamlessly into any space. With a small team and big ideas, we focused on designing simple, functional mirrors that make a difference What We’re About We don’t do gimmicks or unnecessary frills. Just well-crafted mirrors that bring style and personality to your space. Simple, effective, and designed to make a statement without saying a word The Future? More innovation, more creativity, and no unsolicited life tips, we promise. We’ll keep doing what we love—creating mirrors that make spaces feel just right Round Mirror A round mirror softens a space, adding harmony. Its curves complement organic styles and enhance the feeling of openness Square mirror A square mirror provides a clean, modern look. Its sharp lines bring structure, fitting well with minimalist and geometric designs Glass Mirror Acrylic Mirror Acrylic Mirror Tiles Next page
